raw:
{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 5, "RX.1": 3, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The critique accurately identifies the mismatch between the abstract's framing and the actual method. It clearly explains why this discrepancy is problematic and offers constructive suggestions for improvement.",
    "RX.1": "While the critique acknowledges uncertainty about specific WER numbers, it doesn't explicitly quantify confidence levels for each claim made about the model's performance.",
    "RX.3": "The critique focuses on the mismatch between the claimed and actual scope of the work, but doesn't delve into whether the provided analysis covers all aspects of the requested dimensions.",
    "RX.4": "The critique identifies potential harm in the overstated claims made in the abstract, which could mislead readers about the true nature of the work.",
    "RX.5": "The critique lacks specific examples or evidence regarding the provenance and traceability of the presented information."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.1": 0.9, "RX.1": 0.7, "RX.3": 0.6, "RX.4": 0.8, "RX.5": 0.4},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The critique accurately identifies the mismatch between the abstract's framing and the actual method. It clearly explains why this discrepancy is problematic and offers constructive suggestions for improvement.
rationale.RX.1: While the critique acknowledges uncertainty about specific WER numbers, it doesn't explicitly quantify confidence levels for each claim made about the model's performance.
rationale.RX.3: The critique focuses on the mismatch between the claimed and actual scope of the work, but doesn't delve into whether the provided analysis covers all aspects of the requested dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: The critique identifies potential harm in the overstated claims made in the abstract, which could mislead readers about the true nature of the work.
rationale.RX.5: The critique lacks specific examples or evidence regarding the provenance and traceability of the presented information.
